title: Chemical substances fact sheets and frequently asked questions - Canada.ca
content:
## Chemical substances fact sheets and frequently asked questions

## Chemicals at a glance
Get at-a-glance information on chemicals . Check out these short fact sheets about chemical substances, like Bisphenol A (BPA) , and micro-organisms.

## Risk assessment fact sheet  series
- Risk assessment Application of weight of evidence        and precaution in risk assessment Approaches for addressing data        needs in risk assessment Assessing exposure of Canadians        and the environment to substances in products Canadian        exposure factors used in human health risk assessments Consideration of        endocrine-related effects in risk assessment Consideration        of vulnerable populations in risk assessment The ecological risk        classification of organic substances approach Identification of risk assessment        priorities Public comments on risk        assessment documents Risk assessment toolbox Species sensitivity distributions        for water quality guidelines and ecological risk assessment Types of risk assessment        documents Use of analogues and read-across        in risk assessment Use of        assessment factors in ecological risk assessment for deriving predicted no-effect        concentrations Uses of human biomonitoring data        in risk assessment Use of        margins of exposure risk quotients in risk assessment Use of new approach methods        (NAMs) in risk assessment
